data.body:
if you're not on the queues screen and you click on the notification beat id, you get a no-op because the action isn't smart enough to navigate to the right screen.

when a user clicks on that beat id, the proper screen (queues or active) should be navigated to automatically and the detail lightbox opened automatically
data.title: clicking on notification beat/knot should open the queues or active screen and launch the beat detail lightbox
